description.en-US: Official Idle Fantasy repository — get updates faster than the main F-Droid repo.

summary.en-US: Idle RPG: train skills, fight dungeons, craft gear. No ads, no accounts.

description.en-US: Idle Fantasy is a free and open source offline idle RPG inspired by classic MMORPGs. Train skills, fight in dungeons, craft gear, and complete quests. No internet connection, account, or ads required. Features • 14 trainable skills: Mining, Fishing, Woodcutting, Firemaking, Agility, Runecrafting, Smithing, Cooking, Fletching, Crafting, Prayer, Attack, Strength, Defence, Ranged, Magic, Hitpoints • Session-based training: Start a session and close the app. Come back up to an hour later to collect your loot and XP. Agility reduces session time. • 12 dungeons: Fight solo bosses and enemies to earn combat XP, coins, and rare drops. Equip weapons and armour to deal more damage. • Crafting system: Smelt bars, cook fish, fletch bows and arrows, craft jewellery. Consume gathered materials and earn XP and items. • Prayer: Bury bones collected from combat to earn Prayer XP. • Equipment system: Equip weapons, armour, tools, and jewellery to boost stats and skill efficiency. • Quest system: 100+ quests spanning all skills. Earn XP rewards on completion. • Pet system: Rare pets can drop while training skills. Each pet provides a permanent XP boost to their linked skill. • Achievements: Track milestones across levelling, combat, quests, and collections. • NPC Shop: Buy supplies and sell your gathered resources for coins. • No ads. No accounts. No internet required. Your save data stays on your device. Idle Fantasy is free software released under the GPL-3.0 licence. Source code is available on the project repository. Get updates faster Add the official Idle Fantasy repository to F-Droid to receive updates as soon as they are released, instead of waiting for the main F-Droid index to catch up. 1. Open F-Droid and go to Settings → Repositories 2. Tap + and paste: https://idlefantasy.tristinbaker.xyz/fdroid/repo 3. Search for Idle Fantasy, open the app page, and under Repositories set Idle Fantasy as the preferred source.

whatsNew.en-US:
• Fix food overhealing display for prestiged Hitpoints players (simulator max HP now matches the HP bar)
• Dungeons and boss fights now cap food consumption at 200 items per session (best-healing food used first); the difficulty indicator now runs the actual combat simulation for each dungeon (accounting for your attack and kill speed) instead of a defence-only estimate, so ratings reflect real survivability
• Fix queue XP estimate from Skills tab not including pet bonuses, causing it to show le

• Fix pet XP bonuses and prestige bonuses not applying to boss session rewards; both are now correctly applied when collecting a completed boss fight
• Fix prestige XP bonus not applying to dungeon session rewards when collecting from either the Home or Combat screen
• Fix "combat" pets (Dragon Whelp, Void Wisp) not counting toward the XP bonus applied during dungeon sessions; multiple combat pets now stack correctly
• Fix worker cooking/crafting sheet showing English item names instead of the d

• Workers can now be assigned Construction and Thieving tasks (previously showed Coming Soon or did nothing)
• Agility moved to the Support Skills section in the Skills tab, consistent with the Profile and Guild Hall screens
• Automatic backup now includes active sessions (same as manual Export) and no longer writes corrupted files when overwriting an existing backup
• Release APK is now named IdleFantasy-v[version].apk so downloaded copies are easier to identify and archive
• Fix toast for addi

• Fix red dot badge on Quests nav button not appearing when a Daily or Weekly Quest becomes ready to claim
• Fix XP bonus multiplier being incorrectly applied to all combat skills when a prayer cape is equipped - the prayer cape bonus now applies only where it belongs (bone altar prayer sessions)
• Bonuses tab now shows a Combined XP row (e.g. 2.86×) when both an XP Boost and a Church blessing are active, and separates per-skill XP bonuses from yield bonuses so it is clear what each bonus affect

• Fix worker Runecrafting activity sheet showing wrong level prediction by correctly using the player's current Runecrafting XP instead of always starting from level 1
• Fix crafting/cooking start button pushed off screen when many quest goal chips are visible by making the quantity picker sheet scrollable
• Quest goal chips in crafting now only show the current quest in a chain — future quests are hidden until their prerequisite is complete (e.g. Cooking Fish IV won't appear while you're still

• Replaced the collapsible Town menu on the home screen with an always-visible grid: four equal-width buttons (Shop, Inn, Guild Hall, Church) on the top row, three centre-aligned buttons (Builder, Slayer, Carnival) on the bottom row.
• Fix boss fights always counting as magic combat for guild quests — combat style is now tracked correctly so attack/strength bosses credit Warriors Guild and magic bosses credit Mages Guild
• Fix Combat screen tab text misalignment when the Combat Log tab appears d

• Fix "Repeat Session" on boss sessions always repeating as Melee style regardless of equipped weapon; now reads the stored active weapon slot (or falls back to equipped weapon) for correct combat style detection.
• Fix XP breakdown in boss and dungeon session results showing incorrect "Blessing bonus" amounts; total XP now correctly factors in both the 2x boost and active blessing multiplier.
• Fix skill cape XP bonus percentage in the Bonuses tab displaying as negative (e.g. -90% instead of +1

• Fix Magic Bean only appearing in the "Harvest and Plant All" crop picker; it now appears when planting a single plot too. When using "Plant All", the Magic Bean is planted in one plot and a message clarifies it can only grow in one plot at a time.
• Fix weekly boss quests not progressing when a boss session is collected from the Home screen instead of the Combat screen.
• Add a Bonuses tab to the Profile screen showing all active XP bonuses in one place: time-limited boosts (XP Boost, blessing

• Fix Inn worker description to clarify that workers are hired for one job and dismissed after that session is collected
• Fix weekly farming quest (Season's Harvest) showing no progress when harvesting crops with fertilizer applied
• Fix skill detail view on Profile page showing only one item per level; all items unlocked at the same level now appear
• Fix queued combat and boss fights getting the full food supply restored when chained via Repeat Action
• Fix expedition and carnival sessions sh

• Fix: Carnival active game cooldowns now persist when you leave and return to the Carnival screen
• Fix: Carnival tickets are no longer sold by the "Sell Junk" button
• Fix: Guild daily combat progress earned from sessions collected after the 6am reset is no longer silently lost
• Fix: Recent activity log now shows collected sessions in newest-first order
• Fix: Dutch (nl) translation updated with 54 missing strings for Slayer and other features
• Fix: French (fr) translation updated: 203 missi

• New: Carnival added to town; queue idle minigames (Archery Range, Strongman Competition, Wizard's Duel, Fishing Derby) to earn carnival tickets, or play active games (Ring Toss, Hammer Strike, Potion Sequence, Item Appraisal) directly; spend tickets in the Prize Shop for exclusive stat gear (Trickster's Amulet, Strongman's Sigil, Carnival Cape) and the Juggling Imp pet
• New: Magic Bean, a rare farming drop -- plant it and see what happens
• Fix: Ranged weapons now correctly contribute their a

• Fix: Workers (Apprentice, Journeyman, Master) could queue more Firemaking logs than their craft limit; UI now also caps the quantity selector to the worker's limit
• New: Max Combat (level 113) achievement added as the true combat cap; level 99 achievement renamed to Champion
• Fix: Combat style and spell selection not remembered between dungeons; weapon slot and spell choices are now persisted and pre-selected when reopening the dungeon dialog
• Fix: Ranged combat damage too low; bows now pro

• Fix: Worker efficiency not applying to crafting skills — Journeyman and Master workers now produce more items per session than Apprentice, matching how efficiency already worked for gathering
• New: Thieves Guild now appears in the Guild Hall
• New: Added Royal Guard (lv 75) and Bishop (lv 85) as thieving NPCs

• New: 6 high-level Slayer tasks added (levels 85-99): Void Stalker, Frost Wyvern, Abyssal Guardian, Shadow Thief, Spectral Knight, Elder Lich; fills the Slayer gap between level 80 and 99
• New: Thieves Guild added to the Guild Hall (Gathering category): 10 progression quests chaining through all 8 NPC tiers from peasant to high priest, 15 rotating daily requests, and a Thieves Guild Cape capstone reward; Agility Guild moved to the Support Skills category
• New: Agility skill moved to the Suppo

• New: 6 high-level Slayer tasks added (levels 85-99): Void Stalker, Frost Wyvern, Abyssal Guardian, Shadow Thief, Spectral Knight, Elder Lich; fills the Slayer gap between level 80 and 99
• New: Thieves Guild added to the Guild Hall (Gathering category): 10 progression quests chaining through all 8 NPC tiers from peasant to high priest, 15 rotating daily requests, and a Thieves Guild Cape capstone reward; Agility Guild moved to the Support Skills category
• New: Agility skill moved to the Suppo

Game Corner: a new town building with eight casino-style mini-games (Slots, High-Low, Lottery, Card Flip, Blackjack, Roulette, Scratch Card, Video Poker) — all games spend and pay out coins, with a 1-in-1,000 chance on any win to receive an exclusive Ring of Fortune or Amulet of Fortune, two new best-in-slot equipment items obtainable only from the Game Corner

• Selecting "Other" for gender now shows a text field to enter a custom gender description
• Cancelling a repeated mercantile job from the queue now correctly refunds the coin cost
• XP shown in the queue for gathering skills and agility now matches the Choose Activity screen

• Fix: crash loop on startup when a very large quantity of bones or crafting items was queued (e.g. 5,000+ bones)
• Fix: guild hall upgrade appeared to reduce your quest progress instead of just lowering the target
• Fix: boss sessions now end the moment the boss or player dies instead of sitting at 0 HP for the rest of the timer; the countdown still shows the full duration so the outcome is not spoiled
• Fix: Baby Balrog pet was obtainable from the Balrog raid but did nothing when received

• Troll Bones can now be buried for Prayer XP (30 XP each)

• Guild Hall upgrades (3 tiers): guild quest requirements reduced by up to 30%
• Church upgrades (3 tiers): blessings last up t

• Fix: Worker firemaking time estimate now shows the correct per-log duration instead of the gathering session duration

• Fix: Start burying / Add to queue button stays visible w

• Fix: Enhanced potions crafted with ashes now count toward Herblore quests; previously only plain potions were recognised

• Fix: Cancelling the last item in the session queue now correctly refunds coins and materials regardless of session tim

• Fixed: bows and staves now show their attack and strength stats in the Fletching crafting list
• New: while a combat session is active, a Dungeons tab appears so you can queue more dungeons without leaving the combat screen

• Fixed: combat quest rewards (dungeons, Treasure Hunter, Iron Stomach, etc.) now actually grant XP — split evenly across all 7 combat-related skills
• Fixed: Iron Stomach quests now progress when you clear the target dungeon without consuming any food
• Fixed: quest claim button is now disabled until the previous tier is claimed; tapping a blocked claim now tells you which tier to claim first
• Fixed: rune essence is now correctly consumed when collecting a runecrafting session from the Skills
